body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: /debug autonomous mixed-mode debugger
body.description:
**What changed:** Added /debug skill with pointer resolution → Scraps → Haiku/Sonnet → structured report flow.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) Pointer resolution (light inference) may misparse timestamps in unexpected formats — Igor's console uses HH:MM:SS, but other components may use different formats; silent misparsing produces wrong log window. (2) Scraps extractor hardcodes component types (pe_chain, NE, test, schema) — bugs in new or renamed components won't extract state correctly. (3) Report format trained on today's component shapes; if basket dict fields change, STATE section silently omits key fields. (4) CC may still reach for bash over /debug if the skill isn't embedded in the workflow — the skill exists but isn't forced.
**Signals to watch:** pointer resolution accuracy on real debug calls; Scraps extractor hitting 'unknown component' fallback; report STATE section showing empty/partial fields; CC bash investigation commands appearing in sessions where /debug was available.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-11.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
